title: CT branch leak in ecdsa_sign_recoverable low-s normalization
description: ct::ecdsa_sign_recoverable used branchy is_low_s() + if(was_high) on secret-derived scalar s. is_low_s() has early-return branches leaking whether s > n/2 via timing. Fixed by replacing with branchless ct::scalar_is_high() + mask-based XOR.

title: OpenCL field_reduce missing rare carry propagation
description: OpenCL field_reduce() dropped carry after second fold of 512→256 reduction. CUDA had explicit if(c){add K_MOD} step, Metal had while loop, OpenCL had nothing. Probability ~2^{-190} but theoretically produces wrong field elements.

expected.output_hex: reduced field element matches CUDA/Metal output
